reference: Three weeks ago, I went to the emergency room with right chest, arm, neck, and back pain, as well as a very loud heartbeat that had been going on for a few days. Blood work and other tests were good. The chest X-ray was good, the stress test was good, and my thyroid levels are good. I still have constant pain, and three ibuprofen do not decrease it. I am waiting for an MRI on my neck. I am not sleeping well, I am irritable, and I am easily tired. My family doctor is on vacation until the end of August. Do you have any suggestions?
text: Three weeks ago, I went to the emergency room with right chest, arm, neck, and back pain, as well as a very loud heartbeat that had been going on for a few days. Blood work and other tests were good, the chest x-ray was good, the stress test was good, and my thyroid levels are good. I still have constant pain, and 3-ibuprofen do not decrease it. I am waiting for an MRI on my neck. I am not sleeping well. I am irritable, and I am easily tired. My family doctor is on vacation until the end of August. Do you have any suggestions?
